claim: V_quad agrees to 100 decimal digits between backward-CF depths 400 and 600 at 100 dp working precision
V_quad agrees to 500 decimal digits between backward-CF depths 2000 and 2400 at 500 dp working precision
V_quad agrees to 2200 decimal digits between backward-CF depths 5000 and 6000 at 2200 dp working precision; the first 2000 digits are stable
mpmath.pslq([V_quad] + 35-monomial basis in {pi,e,G,zeta(3)}, total deg <= 3) returns None at 500 dp with tol = 10^-450 and maxcoeff = 10000
mpmath.pslq([V_quad] + 35-monomial basis in {pi,e,G,zeta(3)}, total deg <= 3) returns None at 2050 dp with tol = 10^-1970 and maxcoeff = 10000
Two-tier exclusion stability: V_quad is not expressible as a Q-linear combination of the 35-element basis with integer coefficients |c_i| <= 10^4
